# CYBERNEWS full LLM context



CYBERNEWS is a static Traditional Chinese AI and technology-finance news index. It is designed for readers who need concise source-backed context and for article-generation agents that must preserve source links, metadata, and review gates.



## Canonical resources

- Website: https://altoslab-offical.github.io/cybernews/

- Latest: https://altoslab-offical.github.io/cybernews/latest.html

- Archive: https://altoslab-offical.github.io/cybernews/archive.html

- RSS: https://altoslab-offical.github.io/cybernews/rss.xml

- Article generation API contract: https://altoslab-offical.github.io/cybernews/ARTICLE_GENERATION_API.md



## Article schema summary

Each item in data/news.json must use vertical ai or finance; content_type news, column, or research; and one of the seven allowed subcategories. news routes to articles/<id>/, column routes to articles/<id>/, and research routes to research/<id>/.



## Published inventory
